subcodes.first_line: O thou bird of the rose-garden of truth! Thy sweet melodies and wondrous, dulcet strains bring joy to the hearts of the friends and are a cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طیر چمنستان حقیقت نغمات دلنشین و الحان بدیع شکرینت مفرح قلوب یاران و سبب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @poems and quotation from poetry, @chastisement and requital
